summary: Quick Reservation feature tested. Backend endpoint works correctly. Frontend UI renders button on correct rooms (available status, no active booking), dialog opens with all required fields, booking creation works. Minor note: Backend does not validate empty guest name or invalid dates - validation is frontend-only.

minor.issue: Accepts empty guest_name string - validation is frontend-only
Accepts checkout before checkin dates - validation is frontend-only

critical_code_review_comments: RoomsTab.js line 424: Correctly checks `!guestInfo && room.status === 'available'` before showing button
RoomsTab.js lines 232-236: Frontend validates empty guest_name, invalid dates (check_in >= check_out), and zero/negative price
pms.py line 810-814: Backend creates placeholder guest with email `walk-in-{guest_id[:8]}@placeholder.local`
pms.py line 828-841: Quick booking delegates to CreateReservationService for actual booking creation

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and flows verified working

seed_data_creation: Created test booking for Room 105 with guest 'TEST UI Quick Guest', amount 650
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Reservation feature complete. Button appears only on available rooms without active bookings. Dialog has guest name, check-in/out dates (defaults today/tomorrow), total price fields. Backend validation is minimal - most validation happens in frontend (handleQuickResSubmit). Test IDs: quick-res-btn-{room_number}, quick-res-guest-name, quick-res-check-in, quick-res-check-out, quick-res-total-amount, quick-res-submit

button_visibility.description: '+ Rezervasyon Yap' button appears ONLY on available rooms with no active booking

default_dates.description: Check-in defaults to today, Check-out to tomorrow
